hero.name: Akshita Varma
hero.description: I design and build scalable data architectures that transform raw data into actionable insights. Specializing in real-time pipelines, cloud-native data platforms, and enterprise data warehousing solutions.

about.subtitle: Passionate about transforming data into strategic assets
paragraphs: With over 3 years of professional experience in data engineering, I specialize in designing and implementing robust, scalable data architectures that empower businesses to make data-driven decisions at speed.

My expertise spans the full data engineering lifecycle — from ingesting raw data through real-time and batch pipelines, to building enterprise-grade data warehouses and lakes on modern cloud platforms. I thrive on solving complex data challenges and turning chaotic data landscapes into well-governed, reliable data ecosystems.

I'm certified across AWS, Azure, and GCP, and I'm passionate about staying ahead of the curve with emerging technologies in the data space. My goal is to build data platforms that are not just functional, but elegant and future-proof.

projects.title: Real-Time Data Pipeline
projects.description: Engineered a high-throughput real-time data pipeline processing 2M+ events per second using Apache Kafka and Spark Streaming. Implemented exactly-once semantics and automated data quality checks with 99.99% uptime.

projects.title: Customer Analytics Data Warehouse
projects.description: Designed and implemented a scalable star-schema data warehouse on Snowflake serving 500+ business users. Reduced query latency by 70% and enabled self-service analytics across 12 departments.

projects.title: Streaming Analytics Platform
projects.description: Built an end-to-end streaming analytics platform with real-time dashboards for IoT sensor data. Processed 10TB+ daily with sub-second latency using Flink and Elasticsearch for anomaly detection.

projects.title: Cloud Data Lake Solution
projects.description: Architected a multi-cloud data lake on AWS S3 with Delta Lake format, enabling ACID transactions on petabyte-scale datasets. Implemented automated data governance and lineage tracking with Apache Atlas.

achievements: Led the migration of legacy ETL pipelines to Apache Spark, reducing processing time by 65%
Architected real-time data streaming infrastructure handling 2M+ events/second
Mentored a team of 5 junior data engineers and established coding best practices
Implemented automated data quality frameworks reducing data incidents by 80%
Designed and built a cloud-native data warehouse on Snowflake serving 500+ users
Developed automated CI/CD pipelines for data infrastructure using Terraform & Docker
Optimized SQL queries resulting in 70% reduction in compute costs on BigQuery
Created comprehensive data documentation and lineage tracking system
Built ETL pipelines using Python and Apache Airflow for batch data processing
Managed PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases with 99.9% uptime SLA
Collaborated with data science team to deploy ML model serving infrastructure
Automated reporting workflows saving 20+ hours per week for the analytics team

education.description: Graduated with a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals, data structures, algorithms, and database systems. Developed a passion for data engineering through academic projects and extracurricular activities including hackathons and technical workshops.

achievements.title: 1st Place – National Data Engineering Hackathon
achievements.description: Won the national-level hackathon at IIT Hyderabad for building a real-time fraud detection pipeline processing 1M+ transactions.

achievements.title: Best Innovation Award – DataHack 2023
achievements.description: Received the Best Innovation Award for designing an AI-powered data quality monitoring system with self-healing capabilities.

achievements.title: Top 10 – Global Data Engineering Challenge
achievements.description: Ranked in the top 10 out of 5,000+ participants in the Global Data Engineering Challenge hosted by a leading tech company.

achievements.title: Data Engineering Excellence Award
achievements.description: Recognized by TechCorp Solutions for outstanding contributions to the company's data platform modernization initiative.

contactSection.subtitle: Let's discuss how I can help with your data engineering needs
contactSection.availabilityText: I'm open to full-time roles, contract positions, and consulting opportunities in data engineering and architecture.
